overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy afternoon walk through Night City's waterfront commercial district. The player navigates from an open waterfront promenade up through landscaped plazas, crosses neon-lit intersections with heavy traffic, and walks past futuristic storefronts including the distinctive 'BD SHACK' building.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with palm trees and benches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet waterfront promenade, passing concrete benches and palm trees in the rain

notable_agents.action: person with umbrella walking along the waterfront railing

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the promenade, swaying in the wind and rain
metal railing separating the walkway from the water's edge
modern concrete seating arrangements along the walkway
large blue rectangular utility box or kiosk structure
wide staircase leading up to the upper plaza level

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy waterfront promenade with wet reflective concrete surfaces. Palm trees line the right side while a metal railing borders the water on the left. The camera moves forward past concrete benches and a blue utility structure, approaching a wide staircase on the right. A pedestrian with an umbrella walks in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with landscaped trees and illuminated planters

events.description: ascends stairs from waterfront promenade to upper plaza level with different landscaping

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs then walking through a landscaped plaza with large trees and illuminated planters

notable_agents.action: person in blue jacket sitting on a bench to the left

entered.detail: mature leafy trees providing partial cover over the plaza
rectangular planter with blue neon edge lighting along the base
tall building with glass and steel construction visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: After ascending the stairs from the waterfront, the scene transitions to an elevated plaza with large trees and distinctive illuminated concrete planters featuring blue neon edging. The ground changes to paved tiles. A person sits on a bench to the left as the camera moves through this landscaped area toward the commercial district ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with heavy neon signage and futuristic architecture

events.description: exits landscaped plaza into dense commercial street with prominent neon signage
crosses yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk to reach the BD SHACK side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking through the commercial district, crossing the street among moderate pedestrian traffic while futuristic vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving along the wet street with headlights on

entered.detail: large commercial building with prominent red neon 'BD SHACK' signage and yellow trim
angular black building with bright blue 'softsys' neon signage across the intersection
large holographic advertising screens displaying animated content on building facades
tall modern street lamp with multiple light fixtures

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a dense cyberpunk commercial intersection dominated by the BD SHACK building's red neon signage on the right and the softsys building's blue glow across the street. The camera crosses a yellow-striped crosswalk among other pedestrians, passing futuristic vehicles on the wet asphalt. Large digital billboards and holographic advertisements illuminate the hazy rainy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection crosswalk with waiting pedestrians and active traffic

events.description: stops at crosswalk to wait for stream of futuristic vehicles to pass
begins crossing the street as traffic clears, moving with the flow of pedestrians

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk observing the traffic of futuristic cars, then crossing with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: red futuristic sports car driving through the intersection
group of pedestrians waiting at the corner with one holding a glowing umbrella

entered.detail: tall traffic signal pole with multiple lights at the intersection corner
bold yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings

segments.scene_description: The camera stops at a busy intersection crosswalk, waiting as various futuristic vehicles including a red sports car pass by. Pedestrians gather at the corner, one with a glowing umbrella. The BD SHACK building is now visible across the street. After waiting for the traffic to clear, the camera begins crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk with the crowd.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial sidewalk with storefronts and neon signage

events.description: completes crossing and enters covered sidewalk area with building overhangs

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk past the pawn shop and other neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: person with red mohawk and white shirt walking past the camera

entered.detail: corner storefront with teal neon 'PAWN SHOP' signage and yellow trim
vertical neon sign with arrow pointing downward

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the camera moves along a covered sidewalk sheltered from the rain by building overhangs. The pawn shop with its distinctive teal neon signage occupies the corner on the right. A pedestrian with a red mohawk passes by. The BD SHACK building is now visible behind on the left as the camera continues down the wet sidewalk lined with various neon signs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a rainy waterfront promenade into the neon-drenched heart of a dense commercial district. It begins by moving along wet, reflective concrete past palm trees and a metal railing before ascending a wide staircase. As the camera climbs, the environment transitions into an elevated plaza characterized by paved tiles and concrete planters glowing with blue neon edging. The scene then opens into a hazy intersection dominated by the red signage of the BD SHACK and blue glows from surrounding buildings, where the camera pauses at a yellow-striped crosswalk to let futuristic vehicles pass. Finally, the camera joins a crowd of pedestrians to cross the street, moving under protective building overhangs past a teal-lit pawn shop and various glowing signs along the wet sidewalk.
